articles.title: Warren Buffett Added a Big Chunk of This Tech Stock. Should You Add It Too?
articles.content: A true living legend, Warren Buffett is known as the CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-B) and a brilliant stock picker. He focuses on value and, other than Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) stock and Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN), Buffett doesn’t often buy many mega-cap technology stocks. Hence, it’s of great interest that Buffett’s company recently sold some stock shares, and even trimmed ... Warren Buffett Added a Big Chunk of This Tech Stock. Should You Add It Too?
